rss.title: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
rss.snippet: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.

rss.title: Apple says iPhone 17 'most popular ever' as sales soar
rss.snippet: The record results come as boss Tim Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm.

rss.title: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
rss.snippet: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?

arxiv_papers.title: Interoceptive machine framework: Toward interoception-inspired regulatory architectures in artificial intelligence
arxiv_papers.snippet: This review proposes an integrative framework grounded on interoception and embodied AI-termed the interoceptive machine framework-that translates biologically inspired principles of internal-state regulation into computational architectures for adaptive autonomy. arxiv_papers.title: Align Generative Artificial Intelligence with Human Preferences: A Novel Large Language Model Fine-Tuning Method for Online Review Management
arxiv_papers.snippet: Online reviews have played a pivotal role in consumers' decision-making processes. Existing research has highlighted the significant impact of managerial review responses on customer relationship management and firm performance.
